title: Gularia trilineata
taxonomy: Gularia trilineata belongs to the family of lichens and is classified as a species within the genus Gularia. It is a type of crustose lichen, which is characterized by its flat, crust-like appearance. Gularia trilineata is typically found growing on rocks and trees in subtropical regions. This species is often identified by its distinctive trilobed thallus and dark-colored apothecia. The classification of Gularia trilineata also places it within the larger phylum Ascomycota.
